content_fingerprint: hugging face gives gradio spaces a built in api interface for ai agents every gradio space now exposes a machine readable agents md endpoint letting coding agents like claude code codex and pi discover and call a space s capabilities on their own with no manual configuration required hugging face has quietly added a structural hook into every gradio space on its platform each space now automatically serves an agents md endpoint a machine readable description of what the space does and how to interact with it the feature was flagged in the platform s april 17 changelog according to the entry co
